title: trifolium dasyurum
intro: Trifolium dasyurum, also known as hairy trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. Trifolium dasyurum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
